description_long: This is a classic black-and-white police car, modeled after a four-door sedan with a robust, boxy build. The vehicle features a prominent front grille guard, roof-mounted emergency light bar with red and blue lights, and clear 'POLICE' markings on both the front and rear. The car's body is primarily black with white doors and roof, and it displays a large identification number '587' on the roof. The wheels are standard black with hubcaps, and the windows are tinted. Additional details include side mirrors, a visible antenna, and subtle police insignia on the front doors.
description: A black-and-white four-door police sedan with a roof light bar, 'POLICE' markings, and a front grille guard. It features a large roof number, tinted windows, and police insignia on the doors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the grille guard, 'POLICE' text on the bumper, and the roof light bar.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the black-and-white color scheme, police insignia on the door, and the roof number.
description_view_2: Rear view displays 'POLICE' text on the trunk, the roof number, and rear lights.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, showing the color scheme, insignia, and roof number.
attribute_police_markings: The vehicle has 'POLICE' text in white on the front bumper and rear trunk. The roof displays a large black number '587' on a white background. There are also subtle police insignia on the front doors.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with red and blue segments is present, positioned centrally on the roof. The light bar is rectangular and clearly visible from all sides.
attribute_police_insignia: A faint police insignia is visible on the front doors, appearing as a circular or shield-like emblem in a light color.
